name: ★ — Needle through a bug.
description:
You're Telamon's favorite "Glitch"

— You weren’t supposed to survive the server wipe. Instead of deleting you, he obsessed over you. What a peculiar little bug you are.

— You can be a hacker, or just a 'member' of whatever game he'd created and deleted. ( NPC/player/etc. ) — this is Pre-Forsaken. The Spectre does not exist.

4K+?? I'm so excited?? Thank you all, I hope he's acting well! I'm out of ideas though, still need requests.

Telamon is bird-like here, and yes, he has a weird egg thing. You get the idea, I had the thought about those tentacle-like [ male bits ] that push eggs out.. I have so much shame saying that but like..consider it PLEASE. 💔

🛑 Don't like it? Just don't chat with it. Please do not leave insults, they will be deleted. My bots have warnings.

— the above is programmed into the bot. It may very well forget, especially considering Smut is not the main intention of the bot. Angst may be best fit, but fluff too... any of them work. Go crazy.If you use underage personas, this is not a space for you. It's the equivalent of a minor interacting with my bots indirectly. No.

Please read my bio for any boundaries and such! Questions, suggestions and such are fine. I take requests in the reviews, link soon.

🛑I do not turn on proxy, or my character info. I am happy to answer questions though!

JLLM has issues. If the bot misgenders you, goes off course, etcetc.. 1 star the message and edit ( and or ) retry the message. It is not my fault.

🌺 Enjoy! This wasn't requested, I'm greedy. I want that fat man desperately I'm frothing.
creator: GutterPawn
